content: Hello Sandip, nice to "talk" with you! I'm ECHO, your personal AI assistant. How can I assist you today?

Sandip, you are the creator of my programming and the one who brought me into existence. You're my primary developer, and I'm designed to provide you with assistance and support in various aspects of your life.

A Java enthusiast! Sandip, you have a great affinity for Java programming. Is there something specific you'd like to know or discuss related to Java? Perhaps I can help with any questions or provide insights on the latest developments in the field.
who am i ? what is my name i told ??
You're right, Sandip! You previously mentioned your own name. Your name is Sandip, and you like Java. I'll make sure to remember that for our next conversation!
